description: Create an automatic loyalty promotion named 'Loyal Customer Reward - $20 Off' for the 'Urban Electronics' store. The promotion must provide a fixed $20.00 discount on the order subtotal for orders of at least $100.00. Configure the promotion with a display name of '$20 Off Orders Over $100', a usage limit of 3 per customer, and a total usage limit of 500. The promotion must be enabled and apply automatically without requiring a coupon code.
